commands.review_summary:
The PR changes package-manager detection to treat npm package roots with `npm-shrinkwrap.json` and no `pnpm-lock.yaml` as npm, adds an npm deps-status shrinkwrap fallback, and covers both paths with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +36. Total +57 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.5.27 read `packageManager` before lockfile markers, and the linked report shows an npm global package root with `npm-shrinkwrap.json`, no `pnpm-lock.yaml`, and status reporting pnpm.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is real after-fix proof from the actual OpenClaw path plus normal merge validation, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(infra): prefer npm-shrinkwrap.json over packageManager field for npm detection
